label: rule_dry_run_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal → @radix-ui/react-dialog Dialog with size='wide' prop
Local useState for input/running/result → useReducer or react-query mutation for async dry-run API call
setTimeout(600) mock → Server Action calling POST /api/rules/:code/dry-run with the JSON payload
Two-column grid layout → CSS Grid or shadcn ResizablePanelGroup for input/result split
Raw <textarea> JSON editor → CodeMirror or Monaco editor component in production
Hardcoded badge strings (PASS/FAIL) → next-intl keys for i18n

label: flag_edit_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal → @radix-ui/react-dialog Dialog
Local useState (on, pct, reason) → useForm + zodResolver with min-length validation on reason
Toggle component → shadcn Switch primitive
range input for rollout % → shadcn Slider component
ReasonInput → shadcn Textarea with character counter; audit reason stored in outbox event payload
L1-core alert → server-side RBAC check; L1 flags must redirect to PromoteToL2Modal instead of direct save

label: schema_view_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal → @radix-ui/react-dialog Dialog
Summary component (key-value rows) → shadcn DescriptionList or custom dl/dt/dd markup
Mock data from window.SETTINGS_SCHEMA → Drizzle query in a Server Component fetching schema_columns table
Tier-based alert (L1 vs L2/L3) → derived from server data, no client branching needed
Hardcoded tier strings → next-intl keys

label: email_template_edit_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal + local step state → @radix-ui/react-dialog Dialog with useReducer for wizard step machine
Stepper component → shadcn Steps or a custom stepper built on nav + aria-current
Local useState per field → useForm + zodResolver with per-step schema validation and trigger() on Next
window.SETTINGS_EMAIL_VARIABLES grouped list → Server Component fetching email_template_variables table, rendered as command palette or sidebar picker
insertVar() string append → controlled field with cursor-position-aware insertion using selectionStart/selectionEnd
setTimeout submit mock → Server Action for email_templates upsert with outbox event; invalidate RSC cache on success
Mustache preview regex substitution → server-rendered preview endpoint or client Mustache.render()
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys

label: promote_to_l2_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal + local step state → @radix-ui/react-dialog Dialog with step machine via useReducer
Stepper component → shadcn Steps or custom stepper with aria-current
Static diff preview (before/after pre blocks) → real diff fetched from POST /api/promotions/diff with react-diff-viewer or custom pre-based renderer
Local useState for artefact/target/reason → useForm + zodResolver; reason minLength(10) z.string().min(10)
setTimeout submit mock → Server Action creating promotions record + triggering review workflow, guarded by RBAC Admin role
L1 turnaround message → dynamic based on promotion target stage from server config
Hardcoded impact count '12 tenants' → fetched from promotion impact API
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys

label: user_invite_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal → @radix-ui/react-dialog Dialog
Local useState + regex email validation → useForm + zodResolver with z.string().email()
window.SETTINGS_ROLES hardcoded list → Server Component fetching roles from roles table
onClick(onClose) on submit → Server Action calling /api/users/invite with email, role, message; emits outbox event
Hardcoded 7-day expiry note → dynamic from server config token_ttl_days
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys

label: role_assign_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal → @radix-ui/react-dialog Dialog with size='wide'
Local user search with filter → shadcn Command (cmdk) component for async user lookup with debounced search
window.SETTINGS_USERS.filter() → Server Action with ILIKE query on users table
window.SETTINGS_ROLES → fetched roles list from server
onClick(onClose) on assign → Server Action calling /api/users/:id/role with RBAC Admin guard; emits outbox event
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys

label: d365_test_connection_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal → @radix-ui/react-dialog Dialog with size='sm'
setTimeout random result mock → Server Action calling POST /api/integrations/d365/test-connection; use useTransition for pending state
Three phase states (idle/running/ok/fail) → useReducer with 'idle' | 'pending' | 'success' | 'error' states
Hardcoded D365 URL in UI → dynamic from d365_config record fetched server-side
Retry button reruns the same server action; no page reload needed
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys

label: password_reset_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal with dismissible=false → @radix-ui/react-dialog Dialog with onInteractOutside preventDefault and no close button
Checkbox ack pattern → shadcn Checkbox; button remains disabled until checked
onClick(onClose) on confirm → Server Action calling /api/users/:id/reset-password; invalidates all user sessions via session store; emails reset link
Add RBAC guard — only Admin role can trigger password reset for other users
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys

label: delete_reference_data_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal with dismissible=false → @radix-ui/react-dialog Dialog with onInteractOutside preventDefault
type-to-confirm pattern (typed === 'DELETE') → useForm with z.literal('DELETE') validation; button disabled until form valid
onClick(onClose) on confirm → Server Action calling /api/reference-data/:table/:code DELETE with soft-delete flag and orphan check query
Orphan warning ('Any rows referencing this code will be orphaned') → pre-check via Server Action returning affected count before showing modal
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys

label: ref_row_edit_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal → @radix-ui/react-dialog Dialog
Local useState per field → useForm + zodResolver; row key field readOnly when editing (row !== null)
isAllergen branch for extra fields → schema-driven field list fetched from reference_tables.columns metadata; avoid hard-coding table name in component
Toggle for active → shadcn Switch
onClick(onClose) on save → Server Action for reference_data upsert; invalidate RSC cache on success
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys

label: company_profile_screen
translation_notes: Local useState flat object + 'u' updater helper → useForm + zodResolver with Org schema; react-hook-form register per field
Section + SRow primitives → shadcn Card or custom fieldset sections with label/hint pattern
Logo upload button placeholder → shadcn Avatar + react-dropzone with server-side S3/Blob upload action
onClick 'Save changes' → Server Action for orgs upsert guarded by Admin RBAC; emit outbox event org.profile.updated
Hardcoded country/currency/timezone options → fetched from reference_data (country_iso, currencies, timezones tables)
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys

label: sites_screen
translation_notes: CSS grid 280px + 1fr two-column layout → shadcn ResizablePanelGroup or Tailwind grid-cols-[280px_1fr]
Site map with absolute-positioned pins → replace placeholder with a real map (react-leaflet or Mapbox); for production use a lightweight SVG country map as fallback
window.SETTINGS_SITES + window.SETTINGS_LINES → Drizzle queries in Server Component for sites and production_lines tables filtered by site
Inline <table> for lines → shadcn Table with TanStack Table for sort/filter
Toggle + text fields in 'Site settings' section → useForm with Server Action for site update; HACCP cert expiry from certification_records table
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys

label: warehouses_screen
translation_notes: Hardcoded warehouse rows → Drizzle query on warehouses table joined with zones and bin_locations for counts
Inline capacity bar (width % style) → shadcn Progress component; color threshold logic (>80% amber, >95% red) in server-computed field
Storage rules section → useForm with zodResolver; Server Action for warehouse_settings upsert
Toggle primitives (mixed lots, block expired) → shadcn Switch
Expiry threshold number input → shadcn Input type='number' with min/max constraints from config
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys

label: shifts_screen
translation_notes: window.SETTINGS_SHIFTS → Drizzle query on shift_patterns table
Inline calendar grid (7-col CSS grid with day math) → replace with shadcn Calendar or react-day-picker; holidays from org_non_production_days table
Static holiday highlighting ([25,26,1] hardcoded days) → dynamic from non_production_days table with date range filtering
Inline <table> for shifts → shadcn Table with TanStack Table
No save action on shifts or calendar → Server Actions needed: shift_patterns upsert, non_production_days create/delete
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys

label: users_screen
translation_notes: window.SETTINGS_USERS filter by role → Drizzle query with optional role WHERE clause + ILIKE search; paginated with TanStack Table
KPI tiles (active/invited/disabled/seats) → aggregate query in Server Component; seats from org_plan table
Cards view vs table view toggle → URL search param ?view=cards|table; no client state needed (RSC re-render)
Permission matrix (window.SETTINGS_MODULES + window.SETTINGS_PERMS) → Drizzle query joining roles_permissions and modules tables; inline select for role change → Server Action
Inline invite modal (custom overlay) → replace with shared UserInviteModal (SM-06) via Dialog
Pills filter for roles → shadcn Tabs or ToggleGroup; role list from server
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys

label: security_screen
translation_notes: Section + SRow primitives → shadcn Card sections with label/hint pattern using FormDescription
Toggle (2FA, SSO, SCIM) → shadcn Switch; each toggle triggers Server Action for security_settings upsert with RBAC Admin guard
Checkbox group for allowed 2FA methods → shadcn Checkbox with useForm + zodResolver
Password policy selects and number inputs → useForm with zod schema; Server Action for password_policy upsert
Session settings selects → Server Action for session_policy upsert; values stored in security_config table
Audit log table → Drizzle query on audit_log table with pagination; full log link routes to dedicated audit-log screen
Hardcoded log entries → real audit_log rows from DB
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys

label: d365_connection_screen
translation_notes: Local useState per credential field → useForm + zodResolver; URL validated with z.string().url().includes('dynamics.com'), tenantId with z.string().uuid()
window.SETTINGS_D365 mock → Drizzle query on d365_config table (single-row config)
Password field 'Rotate secret' → separate Server Action calling Azure Key Vault rotation API; never expose secret client-side
Toggle for integration enabled → Server Action that first calls test-connection (SM-08 pattern) then persists flag
Client-side URL/cron/UUID validation → mirror with zod .superRefine() for server-side; cron validated with cron-parser
Hardcoded LEGACY banner → feature flag check integration.d365.legacy_mode from flags table
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys
known_bugs: BL-SET-06: D365 constants inline editor (SET-081) not yet built
BL-SET-07: D365 sync config (SET-082) not yet built

label: d365_mapping_screen
translation_notes: window.SETTINGS_D365_MAPPING mock array → Drizzle query on d365_field_mapping table deployed via CI/CD migrations
Direction filter buttons → shadcn ToggleGroup or Tabs; filter applied server-side via URL search params
Export mapping CSV button → Server Action streaming CSV from d365_field_mapping table with Content-Disposition header
Read-only table with no edit actions → TanStack Table in read-only mode; edit instructions link to monopilot/integrations-d365 GitHub PR
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys
known_bugs: BL-TEC-01: Item.allergens[] unmapped to D365 — surfaces red banner in mapping screen

label: rules_registry_screen
translation_notes: window.SETTINGS_RULES mock array → Drizzle query on rules_registry table with type and coverage filters
Type and coverage selects → URL search params; Server Component re-renders filtered list
Coverage badge logic (missing 30d) → computed field: last_dry_run_at < now() - interval '30 days'
Export JSON button → Server Action streaming JSON from rules_registry table
onOpenRule(r.code) → Next.js router.push('/settings/rules/[code]') for rule detail screen
Row highlight for missing coverage (background:#fffbeb) → TanStack Table row className callback
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys

label: rule_detail_screen
translation_notes: Tab state (def/ver/dry/cons/aud) with local useState → shadcn Tabs component; tab id from URL hash for deep-linking
window.SETTINGS_RULE_DSL / window.SETTINGS_DRY_RUNS → Drizzle queries on rules_dsl and rule_dry_run_results tables
DSL <pre> read-only display → CodeMirror or Monaco in read-only mode with JSON syntax highlighting
Version history table (Array.from loop) → real version rows from rules_registry_versions table
'Diff vs current' button → Server Action calling /api/rules/:code/diff/:version returning JSON deep-diff
Dry-run results table → paginated query on rule_dry_run_results; 'View I/O' opens RuleDryRunModal with preloaded result
openModal('ruleDryRun') → shared Dialog trigger; pass rule and preload props
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys
known_bugs: BL-SET-03: Rule version diff button disabled for non-current versions (SET-042)

label: flags_admin_screen
translation_notes: window.SETTINGS_FLAGS filtered by tenant tier → Drizzle query on feature_flags table with tier WHERE clause and ILIKE search
Tab buttons (L1/L2/L3) → shadcn Tabs; tier filter via URL search params for RSC re-render
Rollout % inline progress bar → shadcn Progress
Edit button → opens FlagEditModal (SM-02) via Dialog; on save Server Action upserts feature_flags with audit_reason
L1 flags must route to PromoteToL2Modal instead of direct edit — enforce via server-side tier check
PostHog external link → environment variable NEXT_PUBLIC_POSTHOG_URL
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys
known_bugs: BL-SET-11: PostHog read-through panel not yet built (P2)

label: schema_browser_screen
translation_notes: window.SETTINGS_SCHEMA mock array → Drizzle query on schema_columns table with table/tier/search filters
Dynamic table list for select → distinct(table) query from schema_columns
Multi-filter (table + tier + search) → URL search params; Server Component re-renders filtered results
View button → opens SchemaViewModal (SM-03) via Dialog with selected column data
Export CSV button → Server Action streaming schema_columns as CSV
L1 edit restriction → server-side tier check; L2/L3 edit routes to column edit wizard (BL-SET-01 not yet built)

known_bugs: BL-SET-01: Column edit wizard (SET-031, 8 steps) not yet built

label: reference_data_screen
translation_notes: window.SETTINGS_REF_TABLES card grid → Drizzle query on reference_tables metadata; card grid via shadcn Card

Active table card selection → URL search param ?table=allergens_reference; RSC fetches selected table data
Import/Export CSV buttons → Server Actions for streaming CSV import (with preview wizard BL-SET-04) and export
Add row → opens RefRowEditModal (SM-11); Edit → same modal in edit mode; Delete → opens DeleteReferenceDataModal (SM-10)
isAllergen branch → generic schema-driven column config from reference_tables.columns JSONB field

known_bugs: BL-SET-04: CSV import wizard (3-step, SET-053) not yet built

label: email_templates_screen
translation_notes: window.SETTINGS_EMAIL_TEMPLATES → Drizzle query on email_templates table
Provider section (Resend/Postmark/SES) → useForm with Server Action for email_provider_config upsert; API key stored in secrets manager, not DB
API key password field → never rendered from server; placeholder only; Rotate → Server Action calling secrets rotation
Table with Edit button → opens EmailTemplateEditModal (SM-04) via Dialog
Test send button → Server Action calling email provider test endpoint with sample data
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys
known_bugs: BL-SET-08: Email delivery log (SET-093) not yet built

label: email_variables_screen
translation_notes: window.SETTINGS_EMAIL_VARIABLES grouped structure → Drizzle query on email_template_variables grouped by variable_group
Client-side search filter → URL search param for RSC; or client-side useTransition for instant feel
Copy button → navigator.clipboard.writeText(v.name) in a Client Component; show toast on success
Group section headers → shadcn AccordionItem or simple Card per group
Example value column → sourced from email_template_variables.example_value field

label: promotions_screen
translation_notes: window.SETTINGS_PROMOTIONS + window.SETTINGS_PROMOTION_STAGES → Drizzle queries on promotions and promotion_stages tables
Active vs history tab → shadcn Tabs with URL search param ?tab=active|history for RSC
Stage info cards (TierBadge grid) → shadcn Card grid; data from promotion_stages table
StatusPill component → shadcn Badge with variant mapping from promotion status enum
'View diff' button → opens PromoteToL2Modal (SM-05) with promotion record prefilled
'Start promotion' button → opens PromoteToL2Modal (SM-05) in create mode

Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys

label: devices_screen
translation_notes: window.SETTINGS_DEVICES mock → Drizzle query on scanner_devices table joined with users and production_lines
KPI tiles (total/online/low battery/offline) → aggregate queries: COUNT(*), COUNT WHERE status, COUNT WHERE battery < 20
Battery bar (inline style width %) → shadcn Progress with color variant based on battery threshold
Pair device modal (inline custom overlay with QR) → extract to shared PairDeviceModal Dialog; QR generated server-side via qrcode library and returned as data URL
SVG QR placeholder (Math.random()) → real QR code from server-generated pairing token (UUID, 5-min TTL)
Device defaults section → useForm with Server Action for device_defaults upsert
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys

label: notifications_screen

window.SETTINGS_NOTIFICATION_RULES mock → Drizzle query on notification_rules table
Channel badges (email/in-app/SMS) → shadcn Badge with color variant map
Toggle per notification rule → Server Action for notification_rules update; changes isolated per row
Slack configure link → routes to /settings/integrations?highlight=slack for integration setup
Digest email toggles → Server Action for notification_digest_settings upsert per org
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys

label: features_screen
translation_notes: window.SETTINGS_FEATURES list → Drizzle query on feature_flags table filtered by scope='module' and plan eligibility
Toggle per feature → Server Action for feature_flags update with RBAC Admin guard; pre-flight checks for dependent flags
Premium/Beta badges → derived from feature_flags.plan_tier and feature_flags.beta fields

Plan check ('Premium plan') → org.plan_tier from orgs table; gates which features are toggleable

label: products_screen
translation_notes: window.SETTINGS_PRODUCTS filter by category → Drizzle query on products table with category WHERE clause + ILIKE search on SKU/name
Category pills filter → shadcn ToggleGroup; categories from distinct(category) query
BOM link (anchor) → Next.js Link to /settings/boms/:bom_id
Status badge (active/development/pilot/discontinued) → shadcn Badge with variant from product.status enum
Import CSV button → Server Action with streaming CSV parse (Papa Parse server-side) + validation + upsert transaction
New product button → route to /settings/products/new or open a ProductEditModal (not yet built)
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys

label: boms_screen
translation_notes: window.SETTINGS_BOMS mock → Drizzle query on bom_headers joined with products for name; aggregate for ingredients count
KPI tiles (active/draft/archived) → aggregate query COUNT WHERE status grouped by status
BOM settings section (toggles + select) → useForm with Server Action for bom_settings upsert per org
Toggle 'auto-calculate nutrition' → Server Action triggering async nutrition recalculation job via queue
Toggle 'require allergen review' → stored in org_bom_policy; enforced in BOM save Server Action
Compare versions button → routes to /settings/boms/compare or opens a diff modal (not yet built, BL-SET-02 pattern)

label: partners_screen
translation_notes: window.SETTINGS_PARTNERS filter by type → Drizzle query on trading_partners table with type WHERE clause and ILIKE search
Tab pills (All/Suppliers/Customers) → shadcn Tabs; counts from aggregate subquery
Type badge (Supplier blue / Customer violet) → shadcn Badge with variant map from partner.type enum
Import button → Server Action for CSV bulk-import of trading_partners with dedup on external_id
Add partner button → route to /settings/partners/new or open PartnerEditModal (not yet built)

label: units_screen
translation_notes: window.SETTINGS_UOM grouped by cat → Drizzle query on unit_of_measure table; GROUP BY category in Server Component
One Section per category with base unit derived from units.find(u => u.base) → server-computed field
Base badge → shadcn Badge; edit via row-level action menu (not yet built)
Custom conversions section → query on uom_custom_conversions table; empty state with add link
Add unit button → PartialModal or drawer for UoM create (not yet built); Server Action for uom insert

label: my_profile_screen
translation_notes: Section + SRow primitives → shadcn Card sections with FormField / FormLabel / FormDescription pattern
Avatar upload → shadcn Avatar + react-dropzone; Server Action uploading to Vercel Blob or S3 with 2MB limit enforced server-side
Email field disabled → server-side only; email change requires separate verification flow not in prototype
Language/Timezone selects → useForm; Server Action for user_preferences upsert; next-intl locale cookie set on save
Password section → separate useForm with current/new/confirm zod schema (.refine confirm matches new); Server Action calls auth provider password change API
Active sessions table → query on user_sessions table; Revoke → Server Action deleting session token and invalidating JWT
2FA section → MODAL-MFA-ENROLL flow (BL-SET-09, not yet built); backup codes from auth provider

known_bugs: BL-SET-09: MFA enrollment flow (MODAL-MFA-ENROLL) not yet built — stubbed in prototype

label: my_notifications_screen
translation_notes: Section + SRow with Toggle → shadcn Switch per preference row; useForm at page level
All toggles → Server Action for user_notification_preferences upsert; one action handles all preference keys
Browser push notification toggle → navigator.serviceWorker + PushManager.subscribe(); permission prompt triggered on toggle ON
Quiet hours time inputs → shadcn TimePicker or plain Input type='time'; stored as quiet_hours_from/to in user_preferences
Email preference toggles → stored in user_notification_preferences table per event_type key
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys

label: integrations_screen
translation_notes: Two render modes (list vs grid) via style prop → separate route /settings/integrations?view=grid|list; RSC picks layout component
window.SETTINGS_INTEGRATIONS category structure → Drizzle query on integration_catalog joined with org_integrations for connected status
KPI tiles (connected/categories/sync count/failed) → aggregate queries; failed syncs from integration_sync_log WHERE status='error' AND created_at > now()-interval '24h'
Accordion expand/collapse per category → shadcn Accordion; expanded state in URL param or localStorage
Connect/Configure button → route to /settings/integrations/:slug/configure; Server Action for integration OAuth flow initiation
Recent sync activity table → Drizzle query on integration_sync_log with pagination; refresh via Server Component revalidation
IntLogo component → shadcn Avatar with integration color/logo from integration_catalog.metadata JSONB
